content: Phase 1 POC: AgentProvider + deterministic kernel proven (kernel 11/11 pass; LLM blocked by key budget — seeded mode default, live toggle ready)
Phase 1 POC: run test_core.py green (kernel verified; LLM pending key balance)
Phase 2: Backend — kernel, seed fixtures, agents, adapters, Reset/Jump/Audit endpoints
Phase 2: Frontend — branded shell + Demo Mode + 8 flywheel screens + operator workspace
Phase 2: Golden Demo Run + 5 seeded exceptions
Phase 2: End-to-End testing via testing_agent_v3 (all user stories)
Phase 3: Design polish, additional lane templates, offline conflict UI, accessibility, regression
